demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Migrate JAXB dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
demo1/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind classes are removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+ and the javax namespace is deprecated/removed in favor of jakarta in newer Spring Boot versions targeting Java 21.
